name: Ana Gasteyer
blurb: An SNL character player behind the deadpan NPR host Margaret Jo McCullen.
bio: Ana Gasteyer is an American comedian and actress who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1996 to 2002, known for the NPR's Delicious Dish sketches and impressions of Martha Stewart and Celine Dion. She has since worked extensively on Broadway and television.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
